name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "idle"
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : state[j] # "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state, participants, votes, decision

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
  /\ participants \in SUBSET 1..N
  /\ votes \in [1..N -> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]
  /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "Pending"}

Init ==
  /\ state = "Init"
  /\ participants = {}
  /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> "Pending"]
  /\ decision = "Pending"

Prepare ==
  /\ state = "Init"
  /\ state' = "Prepared"
  /\ participants' = 1..N
  /\ votes' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Pending"]
  /\ decision' = "Pending"

VoteYes ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ \E i \in participants : votes[i] = "Pending"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "Yes"]
  /\ state' = state
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ decision' = decision

VoteNo ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ \E i \in participants : votes[i] = "Pending"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "No"]
  /\ state' = state
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ decision' = decision

Commit ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ \A i \in participants : votes[i] = "Yes"
  /\ decision' = "Commit"
  /\ state' = "Committed"
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ votes' = votes

Abort ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ \E i \in participants : votes[i] = "No"
  /\ decision' = "Abort"
  /\ state' = "Aborted"
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ votes' = votes

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, participants, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Null

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = Null means fork f is free *)
(* States: states[p] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> Null]
        /\ states = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

CanEat(p) == forks[LeftFork(p)] = Null /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = Null

TakeForks(p) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = p, ![RightFork(p)] = p]
               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]

PutForks(p) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = Null, ![RightFork(p)] = Null]
              /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

Hungry(p) == states[p] = "hungry"

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ states[p] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks

       \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ Hungry(p)
          /\ CanEat(p)
          /\ TakeForks(p)

       \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ states[p] = "eating"
          /\ PutForks(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {Null}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A p \in 1..N : forks[LeftFork(p)] = forks[RightFork(p)] = Null
                     \/ forks[LeftFork(p)] = forks[RightFork(p)] = p
                     \/ forks[LeftFork(p)] = forks[RightFork(p)] = Null
                     \/ forks[LeftFork(p)] = forks[RightFork(p)] = p
          /\ \A p \in 1..N : states[p] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* TypeOK ensures num is a sequence of N integers and flag is a sequence of N booleans *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in Seq(N) /\ flag \in Seq(N)

(* Initial state: all flag false, all num 0 *)
Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Next action: any process i can either set flag[i] to FALSE or assign a new number *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element x *)
Enqueue(x) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)
    /\ head' = head
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ tail' = tail
    /\ size' = size - 1

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \E x \in 1..K : Enqueue(x) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS ServerId

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK ==
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [ServerId -> ServerId]
  /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = None
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = None
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ state' = "Leader"
  \/ /\ state = "Leader"
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
